response:
Based on the provided context, Jem Finer played the **banjo** in the band The Pogues.

This is explicitly stated in the text describing the song "Once Upon a Time," which notes it was "composed by **Banjo player Jem Finer**," and again in the description of "Misty Morning, Albert Bridge," which mentions it was "composed by **banjo player Jem Finer**."
